## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Verification

List the commands or manual checks you ran and their results.

## Checklist

- [ ] This pull request targets `develop` unless it is a maintainer release promotion.
- [ ] The change is focused and does not include unrelated generated files or formatting churn.
- [ ] I ran the applicable Python, smoke, and macOS checks, or explained why a check is not applicable.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavior changes.
- [ ] I updated user-facing documentation when behavior or configuration changed.
- [ ] I reviewed the diff for secrets, private paths, raw logs, models, and generated artifacts.

## Related Work

Link related issues or discussions with `Fixes #123` or a full URL when applicable.
